items.caption: A close-up of a person's left forearm with a tattoo that reads "scribble" in a stylized, handwritten font. the tattoo is done in a blue ink that has a slightly smudged and uneven appearance, giving it a casual, artistic look. the person is wearing a gray long-sleeved top, and there is a small, intricate tattoo on the inner forearm, resembling a crescent moon or a stylized letter. the background is out of focus, emphasizing the tattoo as the main subject of the image.
